title: HOLULO Safety Lockout Padlock, 10 Padlocks with 20 Keys Different, Outdoor Padlock Weatherproof Steel Shackle, Loto Tag Tagout Red Lock
features: Ultimate Lockout/Tagout Solution – Heavy-duty Safety Lockout Padlock designed for industrial compliance (OSHA/ISO standards), perfect for securing power switches, air valves, machinery, pipelines, and breaker panels with clear "DANGER" warning labels

10-PCS Multi-Key Security Kit – Includes 10 uniquely keyed padlocks with keys (1 lock=2 key), ideal for team use in factories, warehouses, or outdoor facilities. Made from weatherproof padlock-grade PA nylon and solid aluminum cores for rustproof durability

Extreme Temperature Resilience – Outdoor padlock withstands -40°F to 248°F (-40°C to 120°C), featuring a steel shackle and non-conductive thermoplastic body for electrical safety in harsh environments like construction sites or chemical plants

Industrial-Grade Durability – Reinforced locker padlocks with 1/4-inch (6mm) shackle diameter and 1.5-inch (3.8cm) length resist bolt cutters, sawing, and corrosion. Compact size (1.75-inch height) fits most breaker boxes, gates, and equipment

Safety Compliance – Kit includes 10 padlocks, 10 "DANGER" tags, and OSHA-compliant Safety Lockout Padlock labels for fast hazard communication in energy isolation, maintenance, or emergency lockout scenarios
